name: karigarsetu-functions
description: Google Cloud Functions for KarigarSetu AI pipelines

scripts.deploy:all: gcloud functions deploy productPipeline --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point productPipeline --source . && gcloud functions deploy orderNotification --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point orderNotification --source .
scripts.deploy:pipeline: gcloud functions deploy productPipeline --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point productPipeline --source .
scripts.deploy:notification: gcloud functions deploy orderNotification --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point orderNotification --source .
